basis: currentApplications are fully synthetic consent-safe demo applications; outbound big-player records removed 2026-07-19 — off-thesis (beyond Series A / unicorn valuations), see pipeline/lib/screening.js

opportunities.oneLiner: CI flake triage that finds the commit, not the symptom

founders.name: Justina Kunde
founders.bio: Product Response Architect previously at Aufderhar - Walker; 10 years in the field.

scoreRationale.resilience: deflected follow-ups on the stalled first launch; recovery stories stay vague when pressed · basis: screening call INT-SYN-011 (synthetic)
scoreRationale.autonomy: shipped the first version of Grantly end-to-end before hiring; decisions arrive with owner and rationale attached · basis: screening call INT-SYN-011 (synthetic)
scoreRationale.curiosity: rebuilt onboarding twice from session evidence; asks for disconfirming data unprompted · basis: screening call INT-SYN-011 (synthetic)
scoreRationale.perseverance: consistent shipping cadence; longest documented push is one quarter · basis: screening call INT-SYN-011 (synthetic)
scoreRationale.teamComplementarity: roles overlap on product; founders self-report a working conflict routine · basis: screening call INT-SYN-011 (synthetic)

founders.name: Macy Steuber
founders.bio: Chief Intranet Supervisor previously at Luettgen - Leuschke; 9 years in the field.

scoreRationale.resilience: steady under routine setbacks; no hard reversal on record yet to test Macy properly · basis: screening call INT-SYN-012 (synthetic)
scoreRationale.autonomy: roadmap follows the loudest customer; few decisions carry a clear owner · basis: screening call INT-SYN-012 (synthetic)
scoreRationale.curiosity: iterates when the metrics force it; little exploration beyond the current playbook · basis: screening call INT-SYN-012 (synthetic)
scoreRationale.perseverance: two pivots in six months without closing the loop on either · basis: screening call INT-SYN-012 (synthetic)
scoreRationale.teamComplementarity: both founders answer the same questions; whole territories go uncovered · basis: screening call INT-SYN-012 (synthetic)

outboundSelected.oneLiner: Enterprise mission control for MCP and AI agents: govern, audit, secure and control every tool call.
outboundSelected.latestRound: $1.6M pre-seed led by Marathon Venture Capital
outboundSelected.activitySignal: 2026-01-28 funding announcement — $1.6M pre-seed led by Marathon Venture Capital
outboundSelected.outboundRationale: Enterprise agent adoption is moving from demos into core systems, while MCP governance, auditability and cost control remain unresolved. Public founder-evidence score 85/100 (evidence coverage, not personality; unknowns score zero). Portfolio adjacency (seed+speed): Orq.ai (AI infrastructure), Briink (AI / ESG / RegTech) — warm reference and diligence path. Check fit: Conditional: recently funded; only pursue if an extension, SPV or strategically useful allocation is open.

founders.name: Patrick Eden
founders.publicSignal: Prior enterprise-infrastructure founder; company says his earlier monitoring business was acquired by Cisco in 2021.

founders.name: Undisclosed publicly
founders.publicSignal: Company describes 10+ years building secure systems in fintech and automotive; identity not public on the reviewed page.

outboundSelected.oneLiner: AI-powered due diligence and risk assessment for renewable-energy investments, with source-level traceability.
outboundSelected.latestRound: €1.2M equity pre-seed plus €325K NEOTEC grant; approximately €1.5M total
outboundSelected.activitySignal: 2026-01-29 funding announcement — €1.2M equity pre-seed plus €325K NEOTEC grant; approximately €1.5M total
outboundSelected.outboundRationale: Renewable project pipelines are expanding while legal and technical diligence remains document-heavy, slow and expensive. Public founder-evidence score 92/100 (evidence coverage, not personality; unknowns score zero). Portfolio adjacency (seed+speed): Prewave (AI / SupplyChainTech), e-mobilio (Mobility / Energy) — warm reference and diligence path. Check fit: High strategic fit; investment access depends on whether the announced pre-seed remained open.

founders.name: Marta Vizcaíno Martín
founders.publicSignal: Renewable-energy M&A lawyer with 17+ years in the market and 4GW+ of transactions, per company biography.

founders.name: Arnau Tibau Puig, PhD
founders.publicSignal: 12+ years building data products; second-time founder and former leadership roles at Landbot, Letgo and WalmartLabs, per company biography.

founders.name: Ekaterina Filina
founders.publicSignal: 13+ years international operations and marketing, including six years at Amazon, per company biography.

sources.label: TetraxAI official team and product page

outboundSelected.oneLiner: Decision-context infrastructure that makes enterprise AI-agent reasoning deterministic, explainable and auditable.
